_comment: IFR-specific flight rules — merged with eu/vfr/flight_rules.json at load time. Object keys extend (never override) VFR entries; arrays are appended.

ifr_defaults._comment: Consumed by build_vars() via flight_phase::ifr_defaults(). initial_altitude_ft is the default climb clearance limit when no ATC-assigned level is available.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.rejection: {callsign}, request IFR clearance on Ground or Tower.

REQUEST_STARTUP.rejection: {callsign}, contact Delivery or Ground for startup.

auto_corrections._comment_IFR/DEPARTURE_CLEARED: Departure frequency handoff is handled by poll_departure_handoff() in engine.cpp — no silent auto-correction needed here.

pilot_phraseology.REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE: {airport} Delivery, {callsign}{aircraft_type_phrase}, request IFR clearance to {ifr_destination}, information {atis_letter}
pilot_phraseology.READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_IFR: {airport} Tower, {callsign}, holding point runway {runway}, ready for departure IFR to {ifr_destination}
